name: Herbag leather tote
description:
♥️ Hermès Herbag PM Brown Top-Handle Women’s Leather Tote♥️

Stylish brown tote with contrasting brown top flap and handle. Crafted for everyday versatility with a removable front pouch. Sleek design and secure closure for organized carrying. Perfect for adding a bright, polished touch to outfits.

Good overall condition, with slight signs of wear on the exterior monogram canvas, corners and hardware. Odorless. All bags are 100% authentic.

Designer: Hermès
Exterior Color: Brown
Exterior Material: Leather Cotton
Interior Color: Brown
Interior Material: Microfiber
Hardware Color: Silver
Dustbag: Included
Date Code: C
Year: 2018

Dimensions:
Height: 9.5 "
Width: 11.8 "
